sourcesContent:
<template>
  <el-container style="min-height:100vh">
      <!-- 导航栏伸缩 -->
  <el-aside :width="sideWidth + 'px'" style="background-color: #1E293B;">
    <Aside :is-collapse="isCollapse" :logoTextShow="logoTextShow" />
  </el-aside>
  <!-- 个人信息界面 -->
  <el-container>
    <el-header style="border-bottom: 1px solid #ccc;">
      <Header :collapseBtnclass="collapseBtnclass" :collapse="collapse" />
    </el-header>
    
    <el-main>
    <!-- 表示当前页面的子路由会在 router-view展示 -->
      <router-view />
    </el-main>
  </el-container>
</el-container>
</template>

<script>
// @ is an alias to /src
import Aside from "@/components/Aside";
import Header from "@/components/Header";

export default {
  components: {
    Aside,
    Header
  },
  // 表格数据
  data(){
    return {
      collapseBtnclass:'el-icon-s-fold',
      isCollapse:false,
      sideWidth:300,
      logoTextShow:true,
     
    }
  },
  methods:{
    collapse(){
      this.isCollapse = !this.isCollapse //导航栏收缩设置
      if (this.isCollapse){
        this.sideWidth = 64
        this.collapseBtnclass = 'el-icon-s-unfold'
        this.logoTextShow = false
      } else {  //导航栏展开设置
        this.sideWidth = 300
        this.collapseBtnclass = 'el-icon-s-fold'
        this.logoTextShow = true
      }
    },
    
  }

}
</script>
